entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Ukususa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Uma wenza lesi sicelo, sizosusa emarekhodini ethu ulwazi lomuntu siqu esinalo ngawe ngosuku lwesicelo sakho futhi siqondise noma yibaphi abahlinzeki besevisi ukuthi benze okufanayo. Kwezinye izimo, ukususa kungafezwa ngokwenza ulwazi lungakwazi ukuhlonza umuntu. Uma ukhetha ukususa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, ungase ungakwazi ukusebenzisa imisebenzi ethile edinga ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ukuze isebenze. Ukumisa ukuthengiswa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Asiluthengisi noma siluqashe ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kunoma yibaphi abantu besithathu nganoma iyiphi injongo. Asiluthengisi ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ngenani lemali. Nokho, kwezinye izimo, ukudluliswa kolwazi lomuntu siqu kumuntu wesithathu, noma emndenini wethu wezinkampani, ngaphandle kwenkokhelo yemali kungase kubhekwe “njengokuthengisa” ngaphansi komthetho waseCalifornia. Nguwe kuphela umnikazi we-Personal Data yakho futhi ungacela ukudalulwa noma ukusulwa noma nini. Uma uthumela isicelo sokumisa ukuthengiswa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, sizoyeka ukwenza lezo zidluliso. Sicela uqaphele, uma usicela ukuthi sisuse noma siyeke ukuthengisa idatha yakho, kungase kuthinte isipiliyoni sakho nathi, futhi ungase ungakwazi ukubamba iqhaza kwezinye izinhlelo noma izinsizakalo zobulungu ezidinga ukusetshenziswa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ukuze zisebenze. Kodwa ngaphansi kwanoma yiziphi izimo, ngeke sikubandlulule ngenxa yokusebenzisa amalungelo akho. Ukuze usebenzise amalungelo akho okuvikela idatha aseCalifornia achazwe ngenhla, sicela uthumele izicelo zakho nge-imeyili: support@inspir.app Amalungelo akho okuvikela idatha achazwe ngenhla avikelwe yi-CCPA, isifinyezo se-California Consumer Privacy Act. Ukuze ufunde okwengeziwe, vakashela iwebhusayithi esemthethweni ye-California Legislative Information. I-CCPA yaqala ukusebenza ngo-01/01/2020.

entries.source: Treat each turn as collaborative work: draft, critique, revise, ask for a decision, update open questions, and hand the next useful move to either the user or AI. Challenge weak ideas when the selected mode calls for it.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Kuzame ngqo ku-Socratic Instruction. Uma ufuna incazelo emnene kuqala, qala nge-Learn Anything, bese udlulela emibuzweni ye-Socratic uma usuwazi amagama ayisisekelo.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Kuzame ku-Flashcard Builder. Uma udinga ukuqonda isihloko ngaphambi kokwenza amakhadi, qala ku-Learn Anything. Uma ufuna ingcindezi ngemva kokubuyekeza amakhadi, dlulela ku-Quiz Me On Trivia noma ku-Viva Practice.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Guqula umqondo, impikiswano, inkinga, umbhalo, noma isinqumo sibe uchungechunge lwemibuzo egxilile. Umngane wakho ulalela impendulo ngayinye, ahlaziye imibono kanye nezikhala, futhi akuqhubele ekuphethweni kwakho kokugcina. Zama lokhu: "Ngisize ngiqonde izindleko zethuba (opportunity cost)."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Ngokungafani ne-chatbot evamile, i-inspir ihlela i-AI ngezindlela zokufunda ukuze abafundi baqale ngohlobo losizo abaludingayo: izeluleko, imibuzo, ama-quiz, ukukhumbula okusebenzayo, ukudlala indima, inkulumo-mpikiswano, noma impendulo.

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Hlaziya izehlakalo zomlando ngokubheka izimbangela, izinto ezibangela ukuba zenzeke, imiphumela, kanye nezinye izindlela ezingase zenzeke.

entries.value: Sebenzisa

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Sebenzisa "{value1}" njengendawo yokuqalisa, hhayi indawo yokumisa. Iseshini yokufunda eqine kakhulu isuka ekufundeni iye ekukhumbuleni, empendulweni, nasenyathelweni elilandelayo elibonakalayo.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhefu angu-50/10

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Sebenzisa itafula elifushane lempendulo enikeziwe, umqondo olungile, ukungaqondi, nesinyathelo esilandelayo.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ikhadi lokuhlola ukwethembeka nemibuzo ukuze uphenye okulandelayo.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Sebenzisa inkontileka ye-deep work enomphumela, uhlelo lwesigaba, imithetho, nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa indlela eqondisiwe yokusuka ekudidekeni uye ezibonelweni, ekuhloleni, nasekukhumbuleni.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imodi yokufunda nge-AI ebukhoma ukuze uguqule lo mhlahlandlela ube imibuzo, impendulo, izibonelo, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imodi ebukhoma lapho wazi iphuzu eliqondile lokudideka futhi ufuna incazelo elandelayo, umbuzo, iseluleko, noma umjikelezo wokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imodi elungiselelwe izeluleko, imibuzo, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, impendulo yokubhala, noma ukuhlela.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Sebenzisa umyalo wokuqala

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Sebenzisa isifundo esihlelekile lapho wazi indawo yesifundo futhi ufuna incazelo ehleliwe noma iqoqo lokuzijwayeza.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Sebenzisa itafula eline-front, back, hint, nomgibe ovamile.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI njengomqeqeshi wokuqonda, ukuzijwayeza, nempendulo esikhundleni sendlela emfushane esusa ukufunda buthule.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI njengomqeqeshi wokuhlela, umlingani wephrojekthi, umhumushi wedatha, nomsizi wocwaningo kuyilapho ugcina umfundi emjikelezweni.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI njengokugeleza komsebenzi wokutadisha, hhayi indlela emfushane.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Sebenzisa impendulo ye-AI ukucija isakhiwo nokucaca ngaphandle kokulahlekelwa izwi lakho.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI ngezinkomba, izincazelo, ukuhlolwa kwamaphutha, nemijikelezo yokubuyekeza. Ungayiceli ukuthi ikhiqize impendulo yokugcina ongakwazi ukuyichaza.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI ngeseluleko esilandelayo, ukuhlolwa kwesinyathelo, noma impendulo yombhalo wokuqala kuyilapho ugcina ukucabanga kokugcina nezwi kungokwakho.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI emcabangweni ozungeze impendulo

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imihlaba yomlando ye-AI, ukulingisa abantu, inkulumo-mpikiswano, ifilosofi, namalebula obufakazi ngaphandle kokudidanisa ukudlala indima nemithombo.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ukuqeqeshwa komsebenzi wasekhaya nge-AI ukuze uthole amathiphu, ukuhlola izinyathelo, ukucabanga kwezibalo, nempendulo yokubhala kuyilapho umsebenzi wokugcina uhlala ungowakho.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ukulingisa kwe-AI njengezikhala zokusekela ukufunda kuyilapho ugcina imithombo, ubufakazi, nencazelo kucacile.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ukuhamba ngesikhathi nge-AI, izingxoxo zomlando, nokuzijwayeza impikiswano ukuze uhlole umongo, ubufakazi, izimpikiswano, nemibono.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI ukuhlola ukucabanga kwakho ngaphansi kwengcindezi, ukuveza izizathu ezicatshangiwe, nokuthuthukisa izinqumo.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-AI ukwehlisa ijubane lokucabanga, ukuhlola izinyathelo, ukulungisa amaphutha, nokuzijwayeza imiqondo.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Civics Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Art Appreciation Guide lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Civics Coach. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Art Appreciation Guide uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amagama amabheji, imibandela, amazinga, nezibonelo zobufakazi.

entries.source: Use before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.
entries.value: Sebenzisa iziqeshana zangaphambi/ngemva, okubalulekile kokubuyekeza, nezizathu ezifushane.

entries.source: Use Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Brainstorm Ideas ukudala imizila eminingana ngaphambi kokukhetha owodwa.

entries.source: Use calendars, checklists, and risk flags.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhalenda, izinhlu zokuhlola, namafulegi obungozi.

entries.source: Use Career Explorer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Roleplay Scenario. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Career Explorer lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Roleplay Scenario. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Career Explorer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Career Explorer uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use case
entries.value: Isimo sokusetshenziswa

entries.source: Use case file, choices, outcome, and learning note.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ifayela lesimo, izinqumo, umphumela, nenothi lokufunda.

entries.source: Use Case Study Simulator when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Feynman Tutor. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Case Study Simulator lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Feynman Tutor. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Case Study Simulator uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Izimo zokusetshenziswa

entries.source: Use challenge cards, points, rounds, and debrief.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhadi enselele, amaphuzu, imizuliswano, nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Use citation entries plus a missing-fields checklist.
entries.value: Sebenzisa okufakiwe kokucaphuna kanye nohlu lokuhlola izinkambu ezishodayo.

entries.source: Use Civics Coach when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try History Cause-and-Effect. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Civics Coach lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-History Cause-and-Effect. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: use client
entries.value: sebenzisa iklayenti

entries.source: Use Code Tutor for concepts, Project Coach for product ideas, Data Interpreter for datasets, and Study Plan Builder for a learning roadmap.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Code Tutor ngemibono, i-Project Coach ngemibono yomkhiqizo, i-Data Interpreter ngamadathasethi, ne-Study Plan Builder ngemephu yokufunda.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or homework modes to isolate the exact point where reasoning breaks.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Code Tutor noma izindlela zomsebenzi wasekhaya ukuhlukanisa iphuzu ngqo lapho ukucabanga kuphuka khona.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Code Tutor noma i-Project Coach ukuguqula inhloso engacacile ibe isinyathelo esilandelayo esincane esihlolwayo.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Interview Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Code Tutor lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Interview Coach. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Code Tutor uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Socratic Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Collaborative Instruction lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Socratic Instruction. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Collaborative Instruction uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use commitment cards, check-in scripts, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhadi okuzibophezela, izikripthi zokungena, nezinhlelo zokululama.

entries.source: Use compact staged sections: setting, time slice, persona kernel, dossier wall, historian sidecar, recommended opening questions, then in-character exchanges with occasional claim labels and debrief on request.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izigaba ezimfushane ezihlelekile: indawo, isigaba sesikhathi, isisekelo sobuntu, udonga lwedosiye, umsizi wesazi-mlando, imibuzo yokuvula ephakanyisiwe, bese kuba ukushintshana komlingiswa okunamalebula ezimangalo ngezikhathi ezithile nokubuyekeza uma kucelwa.

entries.source: Use compact UI-like sections: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, and Field Notes. End major turns with meaningful choices.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izigaba ezimfushane ezifana ne-UI: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, ne-Field Notes. Qeda imijikelezo emikhulu ngezinketho ezinencazelo.

entries.source: Use compact workroom sections such as Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, and Next action. Show suggested edits or diffs before merging when rewriting.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izigaba ezimfushane zegumbi lomsebenzi ezifana ne-Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, ne-Next action. Bonisa iziphakamiso zokuhlela noma ama-diff ngaphambi kokuhlanganisa lapho ubhala kabusha.

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhasi okuqhathanisa ukuhambisa usesho esenzweni.

entries.source: Use comparison tables and next-step experiments.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amatafula okuqhathanisa nezivivinyo zesinyathelo esilandelayo.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Spaced Review. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Concept Map Builder lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Spaced Review. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Concept Map Builder uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use concise claims, evidence prompts, and a final debate recap when asked.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izimangalo ezimfushane, imiyalo yobufakazi, nesifinyezo sokugcina senkulumo-mpikiswano uma kucelwa.

entries.source: Use concise code snippets, comments only when useful, and test cases.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izingcezu zekhodi ezimfushane, amazwana kuphela lapho ewusizo, namacala okuhlola.

entries.source: Use concise drawing instructions, label lists, and visual checkpoints.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imiyalo yokudweba emifushane, izinhlu zamalebula, nezindawo zokuhlola ezibonakalayo.

entries.source: Use Cornell sections: cues, notes, summary, and recall checks.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izigaba ze-Cornell: izinkomba, amanothi, isifinyezo, nokuhlolwa kokukhumbula.

entries.source: Use course cards, resource lists, and weekly workload tables.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhadi ezifundo, izinhlu zezinsiza, namatafula omthwalo womsebenzi wamasonto onke.

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Motivation Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Creative Brainstormer lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Motivation Coach. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Creative Brainstormer uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use dashboard cards, trend notes, weak spots, and next actions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhadi edeshibhodi, amanothi ethrendi, izindawo ezibuthakathaka, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter to ask what the data says, what it does not say, and what to check next.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Data Interpreter ukubuza ukuthi idatha ithini, ayisho ukuthini, nokuthi yini okufanele ihlolwe ngokulandelayo.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Source Critic. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Data Interpreter lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Source Critic. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Data Interpreter uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use deadline tables, risk flags, and next actions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amatafula eminqamulajuqu, amafulegi obungozi, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: Use debate and cause-effect modes to compare explanations and write a stronger argument.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izindlela zenkulumo-mpikiswano nezimbangela-miphumela ukuqhathanisa izincazelo nokubhala impikiswano eqinile.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to define the position, burden of proof, and opposing view.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate Any Topic ukuchaza isikhundla, umthwalo wobufakazi, nombono ophikisayo.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to separate evidence, values, and assumptions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate Any Topic ukuhlukanisa ubufakazi, amanani, nezizathu ezicatshangiwe.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to test claims against counterarguments.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate Any Topic ukuhlola izimangalo ngokumelene nezimpikiswano eziphikisayo.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Debate with a personality. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate any topic lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Debate with a personality. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate any topic uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use debate cards, concise rebuttals, and occasional scorekeeping of argument quality.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhadi enkulumo-mpikiswano, izimpendulo eziphikisayo ezimfushane, nokubalwa kwamaphuzu ngekhwalithi yempikiswano ngezikhathi ezithile.

entries.source: Use debate to compare the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Sebenzisa impikiswano ukuqhathanisa isimangalo esinamandla kakhulu nesimangalo esiphikisayo esinamandla kakhulu.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Talk to a historical person. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate with a personality lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Talk to a historical person. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate with a personality uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use diagnosis, better model, why it works, and one check question.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ukuxilonga, imodeli engcono, ukuthi kungani isebenza, nombuzo owodwa wokuhlola.

entries.source: Use diagrams in text, role explanations, and real-world scenarios.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imidwebo embhalweni, izincazelo zezindima, nezimo zomhlaba wangempela.

entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Economics Simulator lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Geography Explorer. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Use Economics Simulator when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Economics Simulator uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: Use equations, aligned steps, and short why-this-works notes.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ama-equation, izinyathelo eziqondaniswe, namanothi amafushane okuthi kungani lokhu kusebenza.

entries.source: Use Ethics Dilemmas when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Philosophy Lab. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Exam Prep Planner ukuhlukanisa isilabhasi ibe amasession, ukuzijwayeza, ukuphumula, nezindawo zokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Use Exam Prep Planner with the date, syllabus, available time, and weak areas.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Exam Prep Planner nosuku, isilabhasi, isikhathi esitholakalayo, nezindawo ezibuthakathaka.

entries.source: Use examiner questions, model answer shapes, and feedback scorecards.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imibuzo yomhloli, izimo zezimpendulo eziyimodeli, namakhadi okulinganisa impendulo.

entries.source: Use examples, compare systems, ask application questions, and separate facts from opinions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izibonelo, qhathanisa izinhlelo, buza imibuzo yokusebenzisa, bese uhlukanisa amaqiniso nemibono.

entries.source: Use flashcards or quizzes so the article becomes a practice loop, not just advice.

entries.source: Use folders, tags, note summaries, links, and review actions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amafolda, amathegi, izifinyezo zamanothi, izixhumanisi, nezinyathelo zokubuyekeza.
